SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.fielddevelopment.integrated

Class ReservoirToMarketOptimizer

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.fielddevelopment.integrated.ReservoirToMarketOptimizer
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class ReservoirToMarketOptimizer extends Object implements Serializable
Reservoir-to-market production optimiser.

Optimises the field-wide operating point of an IntegratedProductionModel - the per-well choke openings and, optionally, the export-header pressure - to maximise an economic objective (revenue or total rate) subject to a facility throughput capacity constraint. This closes the loop between reservoir deliverability, gathering hydraulics and the topside/market boundary, the same coupling performed by Petex GAP and Schlumberger Pipesim network optimisation.

The search is a self-contained bounded coordinate-ascent over the choke decision variables (each in [0, 1]) with a quadratic penalty for exceeding the facility capacity. Every candidate is evaluated by a full network solve, but the well deliverability surrogates keep each evaluation cheap. The optimiser never throws and returns a schema-versioned JSON result, so it is safe to drive from an agentic loop.

Version:
1.0
Author:
NeqSim
See Also:

  • Field Details

    • serialVersionUID

      private static final long serialVersionUID
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • model

      private final IntegratedProductionModel model

    • objective

      private ReservoirToMarketOptimizer.Objective objective

    • facilityCapacity

      private double facilityCapacity

    • capacityPenaltyWeight

      private double capacityPenaltyWeight
      Dimensionless penalty multiplier. The capacity penalty slope is this multiple of the marginal objective value, so values > 1 make the throughput constraint bind tightly (the optimiser always prefers backing off a choke to exceeding capacity).

    • maxIterations

      private int maxIterations

  • Constructor Details

    • ReservoirToMarketOptimizer

      public ReservoirToMarketOptimizer(IntegratedProductionModel model)
      Creates an optimiser for an integrated production model.
      Parameters:
      model - the integrated production model to optimise

  • Method Details

    • setObjective

      public ReservoirToMarketOptimizer setObjective(ReservoirToMarketOptimizer.Objective objective)
      Sets the optimisation objective.
      Parameters:
      objective - objective to maximise
      Returns:
      this optimiser for chaining

      public ReservoirToMarketOptimizer setFacilityCapacity(double capacitySm3PerDay)
      Sets the facility throughput capacity constraint.
      Parameters:
      capacitySm3PerDay - maximum total field rate in Sm3/day
      Returns:
      this optimiser for chaining

    • setMaxIterations

      public ReservoirToMarketOptimizer setMaxIterations(int maxIterations)
      Sets the maximum number of coordinate-ascent sweeps.
      Parameters:
      maxIterations - sweep count
      Returns:
      this optimiser for chaining

    • optimize

      public ReservoirToMarketOptimizer.OptimizationResult optimize()
      Runs the optimisation. Never throws; on failure returns an infeasible result.
      Returns:
      the optimisation result

    • optimizeInternal

      private ReservoirToMarketOptimizer.OptimizationResult optimizeInternal()
      Internal optimisation routine.
      Returns:
      the optimisation result

    • score

      private double score(int[] evalCount)
      Scores the current choke configuration with a capacity penalty.

      The penalty is expressed in objective units (revenue or rate) and uses a steep linear term whose slope is capacityPenaltyWeight times the marginal objective value, plus a smooth quadratic term. Because the linear slope exceeds the marginal gain from opening a choke, the optimiser drives the field rate down onto the capacity bound instead of overshooting it.

      Parameters:
      evalCount - single-element evaluation counter, incremented per call
      Returns:
      penalised objective value

    • clamp

      private double clamp(double v)
      Clamps a choke opening to the valid range.
      Parameters:
      v - candidate value
      Returns:
      value clamped to [0, 1]
